summary: The chapter begins with staff from the gaming company discussing the overwhelming workload caused by an upcoming milestone of one billion users. Simultaneously, the protagonist, known as the Golmok Boss, meets with Raina of the New York Warriors at the High Elf Forest to locate Buzz Island. The encounter leads to a formal duel between the two, during which the Golmok Boss demonstrates superior technical skill and analytical prowess, leaving Raina in awe of his abilities.
key_moments: Company staff discuss the stress of the upcoming one billion user milestone event.
The Golmok Boss locates the entrance to Buzz Island in the High Elf Forest.
Raina requests a duel with the Golmok Boss, resulting in a display of the Boss's overwhelming combat mastery.
